sections.paragraph:
verb להיגעל

to loathe, repulse, reject, detest, be disgusted; (Judaism) be rinsed in boiling water in order to be made kosher (said of dishes)

verb גועל

be rinsed in boiling water

verb להתגעל

to feel repugnance

verb להגעיל

to make someone feel disgust, loathe; rinse in boiling water

verb הוגעל

be rinsed in boiling water
